arts.ttl: Derby County injury latest v Swansea as two out but star man close to return
arts.sum: However, on-loan Crystal Palace midfielder David Ozoh and defender Ryan Nyambe are ruled out facing Swansea who were beaten 4-3 by Leeds at the weekend. "Callum only trained two or three days and when I say that, one was in a gym, the other two were on a snow pitch," said Warne.
